title: 'system.data_type_families'
doc_type: 'reference'
---

## Description {#description}

Contains information about supported [data types](../../sql-reference/data-types/index.md).

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Data type name.
- `case_insensitive` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Property that shows whether you can use a data type name in a query in case insensitive manner or not. For example, `Date` and `date` are both valid.
- `alias_to` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Data type name for which `name` is an alias.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->

## Example {#example}

```sql
SELECT * FROM system.data_type_families WHERE alias_to = 'String'
```

```text
┌─name───────┬─case_insensitive─┬─alias_to─┐
│ LONGBLOB   │                1 │ String   │
│ LONGTEXT   │                1 │ String   │
│ TINYTEXT   │                1 │ String   │
│ TEXT       │                1 │ String   │
│ VARCHAR    │                1 │ String   │
│ MEDIUMBLOB │                1 │ String   │
│ BLOB       │                1 │ String   │
│ TINYBLOB   │                1 │ String   │
│ CHAR       │                1 │ String   │
│ MEDIUMTEXT │                1 │ String   │
└────────────┴──────────────────┴──────────┘
```
